name: AI WhatsApp / LINE Clinic Concierge
business_value: Capture inquiries 24/7 and qualify high-intent treatment leads before human staff respond.
site_copy: Every inquiry becomes a clean clinic pipeline: treatment, intent, urgency and follow-up status.

name: Review Intelligence & Follow-Up Engine
business_value: Turn completed treatments into new Google reviews and detect unhappy clients before public complaints.
site_copy: After each visit, happy clients are guided toward reviews; unhappy clients are routed to private recovery.

name: Treatment Recommendation Quiz
business_value: Convert website visitors into structured consultation requests with a safe, non-diagnostic decision path.
site_copy: Visitors do not need to understand the catalog; the system routes them to the right consultation path.

name: Competitor Price & Promo Radar
business_value: Track visible marketplace offers and prevent SEA from being blindsided by discount-led competitors.
site_copy: SEA can defend premium positioning while reacting intelligently to aggressive public promos.

name: No-Show & Reactivation Automation
business_value: Reduce missed appointments and bring clients back for repeat treatments and package renewals.
site_copy: The money is not only in new leads; it is in repeat treatments triggered at the right time.
